name: Netflix-Tv-Bot
description: Template repo prepared for Heroku deployment.

PORT.description: Port for the web process (Heroku sets this automatically)

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI for storing data

FORCE_SUB_TEXT.description: Message shown to users who must join channels
FORCE_SUB_TEXT.value: ⚠️ You must join our channels to use this bot! Please join the channels below and click REFRESH.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Chat ID where logs are sent (negative for supergroups)
